title: Trump Delivers Urgent White House Address Warning Iran After Peace Talks Collapse

contents:
# Trump Delivers Urgent White House Address Warning Iran After Peace Talks Collapse

## Overview
US President Donald Trump issued a strong warning to Iran in a White House address after peace talks collapsed, stating the US military remains “locked and loaded” and could “finish what little remains of Iran.” This signals potential escalation amid an ongoing naval blockade of Iran's ports and the Strait of Hormuz crisis.

## Reporting Window
- Reported timeframe: Today
- Location: United States / Iran / Strait of Hormuz

## Key Details
- Donald Trump delivered the address, warning Iran directly on nuclear ambitions and military readiness.
- Peace talks between US and Iran collapsed, prompting the urgent statement.
- US maintains blockade of Iran's ports and Strait of Hormuz, disrupting 1/5 of world oil supply.
- Trump declared Iran will “never have nuclear weapons” amid escalating Middle East tensions.
- Incident ties to broader US-Iran conflict now over two months long with high seas standoff.

## Source Context
The @cnni account on X (Twitter) covers CNN International's subject area as documented in this repository's source manifest. The development above appears in news reporting that aligns with the topical scope this account monitors. Verification stems from the cited publication, not from a direct tweet capture (Twitter API access remained blocked during this collection cycle).
